mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, sns_provider, sns_id, name, email, created_at, last_login, enabled FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id WHERE sns_provider = #{sns_provider} AND sns_id = #{sns_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member1(member_id, login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, enabled, created_at, update_at, failure_cnt) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{login_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sns_provider, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sns_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 0)

INSERT INTO member2(member_id, name, birth, email, receive_email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, ipAddr) VALUES (#{member_id}, #{name}, TO_DATE(#{birth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile_photo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE member1 SET password = #{password}, update_at = SYSDATE WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
UPDATE member1 SET last_login = SYSDATE, failure_cnt = 0 WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
UPDATE member1 SET last_login = SYSDATE, failure_cnt = 0 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.select: SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, email, enabled, created_at, update_at, last_login, name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') birth, email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, receive_email, authority FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id WHERE m1.member_id = #{member_id}

SELECT m1.member_id, m1.login_id, password, sns_provider, sns_id, email, enabled, created_at, update_at, last_login, name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') birth, email, tel, profile_photo, zip, addr1, addr2, receive_email, authority FROM member1 m1 LEFT OUTER JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id LEFT OUTER JOIN memberAuthority m3 ON m1.login_id = m3.login_id WHERE m1.login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member1 SET failure_cnt = 0 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
UPDATE member1 SET failure_cnt = failure_cnt + 1 WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT m1.member_id, NVL(login_id, sns_id) login_id, name FROM member1 m1 JOIN member2 m2 ON m1.member_id = m2.member_id
m1.member_id != #{member_id} AND
( INSTR(m1.login_id, #{kwd}) >= 1 OR INSTR(m1.sns_id, #{kwd}) >= 1 )
INSTR(${schType}, #{kwd}) >= 1
mapper.update: UPDATE refreshToken SET rt_value = #{rt_value} WHERE login_id = #{login_id}
